title: Integrate lane outputs with explicit stop points
goal: Integrate multi-agent lane outputs in a controlled sequence with invariant enforcement and human review gates.

steps.text: Collect lane outputs and confirm each lane stayed inside allowed scope.
Integrate lanes in approved order while preserving architectural invariants.
Pause at each defined stop point for human review before continuing.
Run final verification and produce a concise integration risk summary.

acceptanceCriteria: No new invariant violations were introduced
No scope expansion occurred during integration

verification.text: Review integration summary for unresolved risks
